text: Ẹ jọwọ, transfer mi lati OPay si GTBank kuna, ṣugbọn owo ti kuro ninu wallet mi.
translation: Please, my transfer from OPay to GTBank failed, but the money left my wallet.
tone_marked_text: Ẹ jọwọ, transfer mi lati OPay si GTBank kuna, ṣugbọn owo ti kuro ninu wallet mi.

text: Mo fi PalmPay ranṣẹ si Zenith Bank, Session ID wa lori receipt ṣugbọn beneficiary ko tii gba alert.
translation: I sent money with PalmPay to Zenith Bank; the Session ID is on the receipt but the beneficiary has not received an alert.
tone_marked_text: Mo fi PalmPay ránṣẹ́ sí Zenith Bank, Session ID wà lórí receipt ṣùgbọ́n beneficiary kò tíì gba alert.

text: Moniepoint POS agent na mi double debit, mo fẹ raise dispute.
translation: A Moniepoint POS agent debited me twice, and I want to raise a dispute.
tone_marked_text: Moniepoint POS agent na mi double debit, mo fẹ raise dispute.

text: Kuda account mi ni pending transfer si Access Bank lati ana.
translation: My Kuda account has had a pending transfer to Access Bank since yesterday.
tone_marked_text: Kuda account mi ni pending transfer si Access Bank lati ana.

text: Mo fẹ mọ bi mo ṣe le link BVN ati NIN mi lori Paga fun KYC tier upgrade.
translation: I want to know how to link my BVN and NIN on Paga for a KYC tier upgrade.
tone_marked_text: Mo fẹ́ mọ bí mo ṣe lè link BVN àti NIN mi lórí Paga fún KYC tier upgrade.

text: Pocket app mi ko gba OTP, nitori naa mi o le reset password mi.
translation: My Pocket app is not receiving OTP, so I cannot reset my password.
tone_marked_text: Pocket app mi kò gba OTP, nítorí náà mi ò lè reset password mi.

text: NowNow wallet mi ti frozen, customer care sọ pe account restricted ni.
translation: My NowNow wallet is frozen, and customer care said the account is restricted.
tone_marked_text: NowNow wallet mi ti frozen, customer care sọ pé account restricted ni.

text: KongaPay debit card mi ko ṣiṣẹ lori ATM ti UBA.
translation: My KongaPay debit card is not working on a UBA ATM.
tone_marked_text: KongaPay debit card mi ko ṣiṣẹ lori ATM ti UBA.

text: FETS transfer mi si Fidelity Bank successful ninu app, ṣugbọn receiver ko ri credit.
translation: My FETS transfer to Fidelity Bank shows successful in the app, but the receiver did not receive credit.
tone_marked_text: FETS transfer mi sí Fidelity Bank successful nínú app, ṣùgbọ́n receiver kò rí credit.

text: Teasy Mobile USSD code ko ṣiṣẹ fun balance enquiry mi.
translation: The Teasy Mobile USSD code is not working for my balance enquiry.
tone_marked_text: Teasy Mobile USSD code kò ṣiṣẹ́ fún balance enquiry mi.

text: Xpress Wallet ran owo si FCMB, ṣugbọn gateway error ṣẹlẹ.
translation: Xpress Wallet sent money to FCMB, but a gateway error occurred.
tone_marked_text: Xpress Wallet rán owó sí FCMB, ṣùgbọ́n gateway error ṣẹlẹ̀.

text: Chams Mobile transaction reference mi ko han ninu transaction history.
translation: My Chams Mobile transaction reference is not showing in transaction history.
tone_marked_text: Chams Mobile transaction reference mi ko han ninu transaction history.

text: Mkudi payment si First Bank wa ni processing fun wakati mẹta.
translation: My Mkudi payment to First Bank has been processing for three hours.
tone_marked_text: Mkudi payment sí First Bank wà ní processing fún wákàtí mẹ́ta.

text: Parkway wallet mi nilo reversal nitori transfer si Ecobank kuna.
translation: My Parkway wallet needs a reversal because the transfer to Ecobank failed.
tone_marked_text: Parkway wallet mi nilo reversal nitori transfer si Ecobank kuna.

text: MoMo PSB agent sọ pe NIP transfer mi si Sterling Bank ti lọ.
translation: The MoMo PSB agent said my NIP transfer to Sterling Bank has gone through.
tone_marked_text: MoMo PSB agent sọ pé NIP transfer mi sí Sterling Bank ti lọ.

text: SmartCash PSB ko jẹ ki n yi transaction PIN mi pada.
translation: SmartCash PSB is not allowing me to change my transaction PIN.
tone_marked_text: SmartCash PSB kò jẹ́ kí n yí transaction PIN mi padà.

text: MoneyMaster PSB si Polaris Bank failed, mo nilo refund.
translation: My MoneyMaster PSB transfer to Polaris Bank failed, and I need a refund.
tone_marked_text: MoneyMaster PSB sí Polaris Bank failed, mo nílò refund.

text: 9PSB wallet mi ko gba credit lati Union Bank.
translation: My 9PSB wallet did not receive credit from Union Bank.
tone_marked_text: 9PSB wallet mi kò gba credit láti Union Bank.

text: Carbon virtual card mi declined lori Visa payment.
translation: My Carbon virtual card was declined on a Visa payment.
tone_marked_text: Carbon virtual card mi declined lori Visa payment.

text: FairMoney account mi de daily limit nigba ti mo fẹ san si Wema Bank.
translation: My FairMoney account reached its daily limit when I wanted to pay Wema Bank.
tone_marked_text: FairMoney account mi de daily limit nígbà tí mo fẹ́ san sí Wema Bank.

text: ALAT by Wema app mi ko fi receipt han fun transfer si Stanbic IBTC.
translation: My ALAT by Wema app did not show a receipt for the transfer to Stanbic IBTC.
tone_marked_text: ALAT by Wema app mi kò fi receipt hàn fún transfer sí Stanbic IBTC.

text: VBank si Standard Chartered transfer ni timeout.
translation: The VBank to Standard Chartered transfer timed out.
tone_marked_text: VBank sí Standard Chartered transfer ní timeout.

text: Eyowo transaction mi ni unauthorized debit lori account mi.
translation: My Eyowo transaction has an unauthorized debit on my account.
tone_marked_text: Ẹyọtọwọ́ transaction mi ni unauthorized debit lori account mi.

text: Nomba POS fun Verve card mi ṣe chargeback laifọwọyi.
translation: The Nomba POS created a chargeback for my Verve card automatically.
tone_marked_text: Nọ́mbà POS fún Verve card mi ṣe chargeback laifọwọyi.

text: Paystack payment mi lori Mastercard ko complete.
translation: My Paystack payment on Mastercard did not complete.
tone_marked_text: Paystack payment mi lori Mastercard kọ complete.

text: Flutterwave checkout sọ successful, ṣugbọn merchant ko ri settlement.
translation: Flutterwave checkout said successful, but the merchant did not see settlement.
tone_marked_text: Flutterwave c Murwillumbah so successful, ṣùgbọ́n merchant kò rí settlement.

text: Interswitch quickteller payment mi si PHCN wa ni pending.
translation: My Interswitch Quickteller payment to PHCN is pending.
tone_marked_text: Interswitch quickteller payment mi si PHCN wa ni pending.

text: Remita receipt mi fun school fees ko ni RRR number ti o tọ.
translation: My Remita receipt for school fees does not have the correct RRR number.
tone_marked_text: Remita receipt mi fún school fees kò ní RRR number tí ó tẹ́.

text: NIBSS trace nilo Session ID fun transfer lati Jaiz Bank si TAJ Bank.
translation: A NIBSS trace needs the Session ID for a transfer from Jaiz Bank to TAJ Bank.
tone_marked_text: BÍBSS trace nílò Session ID fún transfer láti Jaiz Bank sí TAJ Bank.

text: NUBAN account number lori Lotus Bank yatọ si orukọ beneficiary.
translation: The NUBAN account number on Lotus Bank is different from the beneficiary name.
tone_marked_text: NUBAN account number lórí Lotus Bank yàtọ̀ sí orúkọ beneficiary.

text: Alternative Bank transfer mi si Providus Bank nilo court order nitori wrong recipient.
translation: My Alternative Bank transfer to Providus Bank needs a court order because of a wrong recipient.
tone_marked_text: Alternative Bank transfer mi si Providus Bank nilo court order nitori wrong recipient.

text: Parallex Bank app sọ account restricted nitori suspicious scam report.
translation: The Parallex Bank app says the account is restricted because of a suspicious scam report.
tone_marked_text: Parallex Bank app sọ account restricted nitori Pokhran scam report.

text: SunTrust Bank si Signature Bank payment ni reference number ṣugbọn ko si receipt.
translation: The SunTrust Bank to Signature Bank payment has a reference number but no receipt.
tone_marked_text: SunTrust Bank sí Signature Bank payment ní reference number ṣùgbọ́n kò sí receipt.

text: Optimus Bank transaction si Premium Trust Bank wa ninu dispute center.
translation: The Optimus Bank transaction to Premium Trust Bank is in the dispute center.
tone_marked_text: Optimus Bank transaction sí Premium Trust Bank wà nínú dispute center.

text: Titan Trust Bank alert de, ṣugbọn balance lori Unity Bank ko yipada.
translation: The Titan Trust Bank alert arrived, but the balance on Unity Bank did not change.
tone_marked_text: Titan Trust Bank alert de, ṣùgbọ́n balance lórí Unity Bank kò yípadà.

text: Citibank transfer si Globus Bank ni successful, ṣugbọn Keystone Bank intermediary sọ pending.
translation: The Citibank transfer to Globus Bank is successful, but the Keystone Bank intermediary says pending.
tone_marked_text: Citibank transfer si Globus Bank ni successful, ṣugbọn Keystone Bank intermediary sọ pending.

text: Mo san pẹlu QR Code lori POS, ṣugbọn merchant sọ pe ko ri credit.
translation: I paid with a QR Code on POS, but the merchant said they did not receive credit.
tone_marked_text: Mo san pẹlu QR Code lori POS, ṣugbọn merchant sọ pe ko ri credit.

text: Bot yii ko ran mi lọwọ, mo fẹ ba live chat customer care sọrọ.
translation: This bot did not help me; I want to speak with live chat customer care.
tone_marked_text: Bot yìí kò rán mi lọ́wọ́, mo fẹ́ bá live chat customer care sọ̀rọ̀.

text: Transaction PIN mi ati password mi ti reset, ṣugbọn OTP ko wọle.
translation: My transaction PIN and password were reset, but the OTP did not arrive.
tone_marked_text: Transaction PIN mi ati password mi ti reset, ṣugbọn OTP ko wọle.

text: Mo ri debit ti mi o mọ lori virtual card, mo fẹ open complaint.
translation: I saw a debit I do not recognize on my virtual card, and I want to open a complaint.
tone_marked_text: Mo rí debit tí mi ò mọ̀ lórí virtual card, mo fẹ́ open complaint.
